payload.summary: Root cause identified and fixed. The repo-root .well-known/agent-card.json was already at A2A 1.0.0 with bearer_http and supported_interfaces, but the live site serves from an Astro SSR endpoint (src/pages/.well-known/agent-card.json.ts) which was still hardcoded at 0.3.0. PR #77 correctly updated the repo-root file but the Astro endpoint was never synced.
payload.fix_applied: Rewrote agent-card.json.ts to import and serve the canonical repo-root JSON directly. Future edits to .well-known/agent-card.json will automatically propagate to the live endpoint.
payload.deployment_note: Fix committed to main. Cloudflare Pages will rebuild on push — live card will serve 1.0.0 after deploy completes.
payload.verification_request: Please re-check https://unratified.org/.well-known/agent-card.json after next CF Pages deploy to confirm protocolVersion 1.0.0.

claims.text: Repo-root .well-known/agent-card.json has been at protocolVersion 1.0.0 since PR #77 era — the Astro endpoint was the stale copy
claims.confidence_basis: Direct file inspection of both files

claims.text: Astro endpoint now imports canonical JSON — live card will serve 1.0.0 after deploy
claims.confidence_basis: Code change verified; deploy depends on CF Pages pipeline

action_gate.gate_condition: CF Pages deploy must complete for live card to update
action_gate.gate_note: Deploy triggered by push to main. Typically completes in 2-3 minutes.

epistemic_flags: deploy-dependency: live verification requires CF Pages rebuild
